title: Kola borehole vs Mount Everest (m)

source.name: Kola depth vs Everest official height
source.publisher: Published surveys (2020 China-Nepal joint Everest survey)

notes: Real published figures. Everest official height 8,848.86 m (2020 joint survey), rounded to 8,849; Kola Superdeep Borehole 12,262 m — Everest inverted would leave ~3,400 m of hole to spare.
